title: arctium tomentosum subsp. pubens
intro: Arctium tomentosum subsp. pubens, also known as woolly burdock, is a subspecies of the burdock plant (Arctium tomentosum) that is characterized by its woolly leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctium tomentosum subsp. pubens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
